bead.title: init: prove built-in DDx adapters materialize without project payload
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The end-to-end init/plugin sync behavior needs an executable proof that normal projects get generated DDx skill adapters without receiving a full built-in payload under .ddx/plugins/ddx. Without that proof, future changes can regress to materializing project-local default package resources.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
- docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-13-ddx-skill-package-layout.md:18-27 says projects should use generated adapters and cache-backed/defaultplugin resolution rather than checking in generated payloads.
- cli/internal/config/types.go:623-672 still defaults library.path to .ddx/plugins/ddx in DefaultNewConfig and ApplyDefaults.
- cli/internal/registry/registry.go:75-82 and cli/internal/registry/defaultplugin/library/package.yaml:14-22 still expose install.root.target=.ddx/plugins/ddx for the built-in ddx package.
- cli/internal/registry/registry_test.go:60-68 asserts the legacy .ddx/plugins/ddx target.

PROPOSED FIX
Extend the existing init/plugin sync coverage so a plain ddx init followed by plugin sync leaves .ddx/plugins/ddx absent while generated adapters under .agents/skills/ddx and .claude/skills/ddx exist and point to working built-in DDx resources. Keep the test focused on normal installs, not local development overlays.

NON-SCOPE
Do not remove support for explicit local development overlays. Do not remove the embedded default plugin fallback needed for offline ddx init. Do not change HELIX marketplace packaging.

PARENT
ddx-602ae31a

GOVERNING ARTIFACT
- docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-13-ddx-skill-package-layout.md:18-27
bead.acceptance:
1. TestInitProject_MaterializesBuiltinAdaptersWithoutPluginPayload still passes and explicitly asserts .ddx/plugins/ddx is absent after normal ddx init/plugin sync.
2. TestDefaultDDxPackageDoesNotRequireProjectPayload proves .agents/skills/ddx and .claude/skills/ddx are generated and usable without a project-local .ddx/plugins/ddx payload.
3. TestPluginSyncDoesNotMaterializeBuiltinProjectPayload proves rerunning plugin sync does not create .ddx/plugins/ddx for the built-in DDx package in the normal install path.
4. `cd cli && go test ./internal/registry/... ./internal/config/... ./cmd/... ./internal/server/frontend/...` passes.
5. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
